redGreenRefactorEvidence.failingTestEvidence: Product cursor not persisted from recorded samples because sync_products read updated_at instead of update_time

implementationSummary: Issue #367: added end-to-end Fujiwa poll orchestration integration tests that replay sanitized TikTok contract samples through ProductionReadClientFactory, sync workers, and TikTokSyncStateRepo. Covers initial poll persistence, re-poll idempotency, and partial endpoint failure recovery without live Partner API credentials.
assumptions: Recorded replay from docs/integrations/tiktok_api/samples is sufficient CI coverage; Fujiwa production-read live polling remains out of scope for sandbox secrets
tests/integration/conftest.py provides DB fixtures until broader test suite restructure lands on main
risks: Replay harness must strip pagination tokens from fixtures to avoid infinite client pagination loops
